title.description: Specifies the title of the code tour.

description.description: Specifies an optional description for the code tour.

ref.description: Indicates the git ref (branch/commit/tag) that this tour associate with.

isPrimary.description: Specifies whether the tour represents the primary tour for this codebase.

nextTour.description: Specifies the title of the tour that is meant to follow this tour.

stepMarker.description: Specifies the marker that indicates a line of code represents a step for this tour.

when.description: Specifies the condition (JavaScript expression) that must be met before this tour is shown.

steps.description: Specifies the list of steps that are included in the code tour.

title.description: An optional title for the step.

description.description: Description of the step. Supports markdown.

file.description: File path (relative to the workspace root) that the step is associated with.

directory.description: Directory path (relative to the workspace root) that the step is associated with.

uri.description: Absolute URI (https://...) associated with the step. Use for PRs, issues, docs, ADRs.

line.description: Line number (1-based) that the step is associated with.

pattern.description: Regex to associate the step with a line by content instead of line number. Useful when line numbers shift frequently.

selection.description: Text selection range associated with the step. Use when a block of code (not a single line) is the point.

line.description: Line number (1-based) where the selection starts.

character.description: Column number (1-based) where the selection starts.

line.description: Line number (1-based) where the selection ends.

character.description: Column number (1-based) where the selection ends.

view.description: VS Code view ID to auto-focus when navigating to this step (e.g. 'terminal', 'explorer', 'problems', 'scm').

commands.description: VS Code command URIs to execute when this step is navigated to.
